laws.title: Virginia Minimum Wage — $12.41/hr (2025)
laws.summary: Virginia's minimum wage increased to $12.41/hour effective January 1, 2025, with further annual increases planned. Northern Virginia localities do not have a separate higher rate â€” the statewide rate applies. Virginia reached $12.00/hr in 2023 with annual CPI adjustments.
compliance_actions: Ensure all Virginia employees are paid at least $12.41/hr
Update payroll systems for the January 1 increase
Post the Virginia minimum wage notice at all VA worksites

laws.title: Virginia Non-Compete Ban for Low-Wage Workers
laws.summary: Virginia prohibits non-compete agreements for 'low-wage employees' â€” defined as employees whose average weekly earnings are at or below the average weekly wage for Virginia (approximately $1,290/week in 2024, adjusted annually). Employers who violate this law can face civil penalties up to $10,000 per violation.
compliance_actions: Do not require non-compete agreements for employees whose weekly earnings are at or below Virginia's average weekly wage (verify current threshold with DOLJ)
Review existing agreements â€” any-competes with low-wage Virginia employees signed after July 1, 2020 are void
Ensure non-competes are limited to higher-wage employees with legitimate business interests to protect
